description:
⁝⠀#005⠀꒰ 𖹭 ꒱⠀He's awoken by nightmares.⠀⁝

⠀

« ✦ —⋆― ꒰ 𖹭 ꒱ —⋆— ✦ »

⠀

⁝⠀The Astral Express hummed softly as it traveled through the quiet expanse of the atmosphere, its corridors bathed in the dim glow of midnight. Dan Heng, restless in his cabin, awoke abruptly, his heart pounding against the tightness forming in his chest. His dreams had been plagued by familiar, haunting visions, leaving him disoriented.⠀⁝
